titleStmt.title: SII 37.299: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 299. (A.R. No. B 405 of 1940-41.) Vēlpucherla, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in survey No. 283, west of the village.
This is dated in the cyclic year Vikrama, Āshāḍha śu. 5, Wednesday.

Fragmentary. It records gift of mānya and rations to Pōtularāju of Vēlpucherla by Sakala-Sandōha (i.e., general body of devotees) from the fifty six countries who assembled in the maṇḍapa of the goddess at Vēlpucherla.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu . vikrama saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha su 15 bu śrīmanmahādēvi jayākavīrāṁbakī jaraṇaika māta guṇō
pēta divya saṁbuta nitya kalyāṇi paraṁjōti parabraṁhma svarupi Ayana vēlpuje¨rla Aṁmagāri mukhamaṁḍapamaṁ
du vajraśiṁhāsanārūḍhulayi kū¨rcunna saraḷa saṁdōhamunu yāṁbayi Āru dēsahālunu pōtularāju jagili pedō
ju koḍuku yallaya caṁdra komāruṁḍu pōtularāju jagiti siśesainu saṁtōṣapaḍi yiccina manyaḍavelpuca¨rlanu liṁgate va

ppuḍu komaḷatōpaṭu vīḍela bhōjana kaṭṭaḍa naḍapuvāraṁ yi
ppinavāraṁ maṁgaḷamahā śrī je
Digital edition of SII 37.299 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
